_comment: P36 compliance monitors. Load: python3 tools/source_currency.py seed-sources canonical-sources/compliance-sources-seed.json. The eCFR Versioner API is the gold-standard token-free signal (hash the part XML). Government primary sources are public domain (cache freely); model building codes (ICC/NFPA) are copyrighted -> cache the ADOPTION FACT/DATE only, never the code text. Note: FTC Part 255 is unchanged since 2023-07-26; the 2024 action is the separate Part 465.
name: FTC Consumer Reviews & Testimonials rule, eCFR 16 CFR Part 465
extraction_hint: the real 2024 legislative rule (effective 2024-10-21): bans fake/AI-generated reviews, undisclosed insider reviews, review suppression; sha256 the Versioner part XML

name: FTC press releases (RSS)
extraction_hint: the primary FTC change signal; filter items for endorsement/reviews/AI/influencer; announces new AI-endorsement actions

name: Federal Register API (FTC endorsement/reviews rulemaking)
extraction_hint: JSON, no key; newest document_number for CFR title 16 FTC actions on Part 255/465

name: US Copyright Office Federal Register notices (RSS)
extraction_hint: USCO rule changes incl. the Copyright-and-AI report series; public domain, free to poll

name: New York synthetic-performer ad disclosure law (S8420)
extraction_hint: first-in-nation ad rule (effective 2026-06-09): conspicuous disclosure when an ad uses a synthetic performer; hash the bill status page or use the NY Senate JSON API

name: California AI Transparency Act (SB 942, amended by AB 853)
extraction_hint: provenance/disclosure duties for large GenAI providers; effective 2026-08-02 (delayed by AB 853); watch for further amending bills

name: DOE Building Energy Codes state certifications (IECC)
extraction_hint: DOE 2024 IECC determination; residential certification deadline 2026-12-30; cache adoption status/dates (facts), never the IECC text

name: ICC I-Code adoption maps (PDF)
extraction_hint: state-by-state adopted I-Code editions; sha256 the PDF bytes; store the adoption FACT only (ICC text is copyrighted, no scraping)
